creator: mva@FreeBSD.org
text:
Since I am unable to reproduce this, can you please provide more details
to your environment, including

- the options set for the blender port (make showconfig)
- any special options set in /etc/make.conf that might have an impact on
  your ports
- your alsoft.rc configuration, if any
- your exact PulseAudio configuration, if any
- information about your graphics and sound card

Also, please note that the blender port was updated recently. Do you
mind to give the new version (2.67) a try and check, if it also fails for
you?

Thanks
Marcus
